channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: At Least 17 People Killed By Gunmen In Northwestern Nigeria

media:content.media:description: The attack occurred on Friday in the town of Goron Namaye.

item.description: No group has claimed responsibility but attacks by armed gangs have increased in recent months.
item.content:encoded: No group has claimed responsibility but attacks by armed gangs have increased in recent months.

item.title: 'Deal With Iran On Sunday, Strait Of Hormuz To Be Open To All': Trump

media:content.media:description: Comparing the deal to Obama's, Trump said that his deal is the "exact opposite"

item.description: 'Deal With Iran Tomorrow, Strait Of Hormuz To Be Open To All': Trump
item.content:encoded: <iframe title="Player" class="head-story__img img__full lazyload" height="300" scrolling=no frameborder=no src="about:blank" data-src="https://www.ndtv.com/video/embed-player/id/1112785/play-via-app-wap?pWidth=100&pHeight=100&embed_type=story&site=classic&autostart=1"> </iframe>'Deal With Iran Tomorrow, Strait Of Hormuz To Be Open To All': Trump

item.title: "Bought Under Price Cap": Finland Minister Backs India On Russia Oil Purchase

media:content.media:description: Valtonen explained that the aim of the price cap was to keep global energy supplies stable

item.description: Speaking at the Kultaranta Talks, Finnish Foreign Minister Elina Valtonen defended India's position.
item.content:encoded: Speaking at the Kultaranta Talks, Finnish Foreign Minister Elina Valtonen defended India's position.

item.title: Trump May Discuss Hormuz Demining Efforts At G7 Amid Signs Of Peace Deal
item.description: Britain and France, who are both members of the G7, have expressed interest in assisting with demining the critical waterway once the conflict is paused.
item.content:encoded: Britain and France, who are both members of the G7, have expressed interest in assisting with demining the critical waterway once the conflict is paused.

item.title: Trump's Name Removed From Kennedy Centre After Court Says It's Unlawful

media:content.media:description: The Kennedy Centre dropped Trump's name from the website of the institution earlier this week.

item.description: The effort came after a judge rejected a last-minute bid by the centre's board to halt the removal of Trump's name, marking a setback for the president's broader push
item.content:encoded: The effort came after a judge rejected a last-minute bid by the centre's board to halt the removal of Trump's name, marking a setback for the president's broader push

item.title: PM Modi, Trump To Meet In France On G-7 Sidelines, Confirms White House

media:content.media:description: PM Narendra Modi will meet with Donald Trump at the G7 Summit

item.description: PM Modi, Trump Will Meet In France, Confirms White House
item.content:encoded: PM Modi, Trump Will Meet In France, Confirms White House

item.title: Elon Musk, World's 1st Trillionaire, Lives In 400-Square-Foot House In Texas

media:content.media:description: Musk's everyday home is a small prefabricated house in Texas

item.description: While Elon Musk's fortune has reached unimaginable levels, his everyday home is a small prefabricated house in Texas.
item.content:encoded: While Elon Musk's fortune has reached unimaginable levels, his everyday home is a small prefabricated house in Texas.

item.title: US, Iran Close To Signing Deal Again: All You Need To Know

media:content.media:description: Previous declarations of an imminent breakthrough failed to materialise.

item.description: Pakistani Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif said Saturday that a deal aimed at ending the war in the Middle East is closer than ever before and expected to be finalised within 24 hours.
item.content:encoded: Pakistani Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif said Saturday that a deal aimed at ending the war in the Middle East is closer than ever before and expected to be finalised within 24 hours.

item.title: Violations Of Hormuz Blockade Won't Be Tolerated: Rubio To S Jaishankar

media:content.media:description: Rubio conveyed this to External Affairs Minister S Jaishankar.

item.description: Rubio underscored that violations of the US blockade and the illicit transport of Iranian oil will not be tolerated, Pigott said in a statement here.
item.content:encoded: Rubio underscored that violations of the US blockade and the illicit transport of Iranian oil will not be tolerated, Pigott said in a statement here.

item.title: AI, Space Exploration, Brain Implants: Inside Elon Musk's Business Empire

media:content.media:description: Elon Musk has become the world's first trillionaire.

item.description: Elon Musk, the world's richest man and now first-ever trillionaire, controls a lot of different businesses. Here's a look at Musk's vast business empire.
item.content:encoded: Elon Musk, the world's richest man and now first-ever trillionaire, controls a lot of different businesses. Here's a look at Musk's vast business empire.

item.title: 11-Foot Shark Mauls Woman In Sydney, She Grabs Onto Paddleboat To Escape

media:content.media:description: Australia has averaged between two and three fatal shark attacks a year since 2000.

item.description: The 35-year-old suffered serious leg and arm injuries in the attack at 11:15 am off Coogee Beach, a police statement said.
item.content:encoded: The 35-year-old suffered serious leg and arm injuries in the attack at 11:15 am off Coogee Beach, a police statement said.

item.title: Aim, Then Boom: Trump Shares Footage Of Strike On Venezuelan Cartel Leader

media:content.media:description: Trump shared a video of a strike that showed a green-roofed building being blown to pieces

item.description: In a post on Truth Social, Trump said that the "infamous leader" of Tren de Aragua, Hector Rusthenford Guerrero Flores, also known as Nino Guerrero, was "successfully" executed.
item.content:encoded: In a post on Truth Social, Trump said that the "infamous leader" of Tren de Aragua, Hector Rusthenford Guerrero Flores, also known as Nino Guerrero, was "successfully" executed.

item.title: Pak's Shehbaz Sharif Says US-Iran Deal Likely To Be Finalised In 24 Hours

media:content.media:description: Pakistan has played a role in US-Iran talks.

item.description: Weeks of negotiations on a peace agreement after an April 8 truce have so far not yielded success, with US President Donald Trump repeatedly insisting a deal is near.
item.content:encoded: Weeks of negotiations on a peace agreement after an April 8 truce have so far not yielded success, with US President Donald Trump repeatedly insisting a deal is near.

item.title: Iran's Ali Khamenei To Be Buried In Hometown Mashhad On July 9

media:content.media:description: The burial will follow three days of funeral ceremonies in capital Tehran.

item.description: The burial in Ali Khamenei's hometown, the northeastern holy city of Mashhad, initially scheduled for March but postponed due to the war
item.content:encoded: The burial in Ali Khamenei's hometown, the northeastern holy city of Mashhad, initially scheduled for March but postponed due to the war

item.title: 15 Weeks, 5,000 Strikes: How US-Iran War Spiralled Across Middle East

media:content.media:description: Countries that were counted among the safest in the world have been sending incoming missile alerts.

item.description: While Iran and the Middle East are paying a heavy price for the loss of men and material, the US, too, is paying a fortune to continue the war.
item.content:encoded: While Iran and the Middle East are paying a heavy price for the loss of men and material, the US, too, is paying a fortune to continue the war.

item.title: Mag 7 To MANGOS? SpaceX May Push Wall Street To Rename Tech Stock Bundle

media:content.media:description: The SpaceX IPO has set off a race to devise the next cool acronym.

item.description: The IPO, the biggest in US history, vaulted SpaceX's value above two Mag 7 members: CEO Elon Musk's other company, Tesla, and Meta Platforms.
item.content:encoded: The IPO, the biggest in US history, vaulted SpaceX's value above two Mag 7 members: CEO Elon Musk's other company, Tesla, and Meta Platforms.

item.title: US-Iran War Live: "Finalisation Likely Expected In The Next 24 Hours", Pak PM On US-Iran Deal
item.description: US-Israel-Iran War News Live Updates: Trump said key points of a potential agreement have been worked out with support from several countries, raising hopes of a deal soon.
item.content:encoded: US-Israel-Iran War News Live Updates: Trump said key points of a potential agreement have been worked out with support from several countries, raising hopes of a deal soon.

item.title: Two Phones And An App: How Russians Skirt Putin's Digital Iron Curtain

media:content.media:description: VPN downloads surge in Russia as users adapt to internet curbs and government-mandated apps.

item.description: In a quiet cafe popular for its free WiFi and good coffee, a Russian interior designer logs onto a virtual private network so she can chat with friends
item.content:encoded: In a quiet cafe popular for its free WiFi and good coffee, a Russian interior designer logs onto a virtual private network so she can chat with friends

item.title: Opinion: Opinion | The Kashmir Protest Pakistan Cannot Blame On India
item.description: Islamabad has long viewed political mobilisation in PoK through an external lens of alleged Indian 'interference'. But the recent uprisings in the region lays bare the limits of its own policy.
item.content:encoded: Islamabad has long viewed political mobilisation in PoK through an external lens of alleged Indian 'interference'. But the recent uprisings in the region lays bare the limits of its own policy.

item.title: India's UN Security Council Seat Bid Is Logical: UN Watchdog Chief Rafael Grossi

media:content.media:description: Grossi's remarks come as race to succeed current UN Secretary General gathers pace

item.description: Grossi's remarks carry particular weight not only because of the ongoing race to succeed current UN chief, but also because of his stature as head of world's top nuclear watchdog and a seasoned global diplomat
item.content:encoded: Grossi's remarks carry particular weight not only because of the ongoing race to succeed current UN chief, but also because of his stature as head of world's top nuclear watchdog and a seasoned global diplomat
